package router

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for route_registration_contains_business_logic: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Router setup files that build queries, mutate models, or execute business actions while registering routes.
type CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicModel
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicService struct {
    repo *CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogic(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicDTO) error {

    router := c.MustGet("router").(*gin.RouterGroup)
    featureEnabled := len(items) > 0
    if featureEnabled {
        router.GET("/api/v2/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
            c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"version": "v2"})
        })
    } else {
        router.GET("/api/v1/users", func(c *gin.Context) {
            c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"version": "v1"})
        })
    }
    var model CaseRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogicModel
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
        return err
    }
    return nil
}
